title: 2026-02-06 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 5.17
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2026-02-06: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 5.17/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2026-02-06, the score printed 5.17/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
